zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII于1140年出生在德国貝也爾茲包格时，他的父亲Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV31岁，母亲Bertha Von Putelendorf21岁。他和Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria至少有8个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1190年9月14日在叙利亚艾爾 h亞薩卡馬爾卡布享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Count
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French counte ‘count’ (Old French conte, from Latin comes, comitem); a title of French and Norman nobility, ranking as equivalent to English Earl .

variants.name: Earl
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English e(o)rl ‘earl’, a traditional English title of nobility equivalent in rank to French and Norman Count .

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Henneberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Beate, Ewald, Kurt, Ulrich.
German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Henneberger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Fritz, Gerhard.
German: habitational name for someone from a place called Henneberg (see   Henneberg  ).

variants.name: Henneberry
meanings: Americanized form of German and Dutch   Henneberg  .

nameMeanings.name: Poppo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the word denoting the flower, Old English popæg (from Latin papaver). It has been used as a given name since the latter years of the 19th century. It reached a peak of popularity in the 1920s and since the late 1990s has again been back in fashion.

en.lifeSummary: When Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII was born in 1140, in Würzburg, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV, was 31 and his mother, Bertha Von Putelendorf, was 21. He had at least 8 sons and 2 daughters with Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria. He died on 14 September 1190, in Markab, Al Ḩasakah, Syria, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII est né en 1140, à Würzburg, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Bertha Von Putelendorf, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles avec Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1190, à Markab, Al Ḩasakah, Syrie, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII 1140 in Würzburg, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV 31 und seine Mutter Bertha Von Putelendorf 21. Er hatte mit Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. September 1190 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Markab, Al Ḩasakah, Syrien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII è nato il nel 1140 nel Würzburg, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Bertha Von Putelendorf, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie con Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria. Morì il 14 settembre 1190, nel Markab, Al Ḩasakah, Siria, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Poppo Count Of Henneberg XIIが1140年にドイツバイエルンウuルズブルグで生まれた時，父Berthold Count Of Henneberg IVは31歳，母Bertha Von Putelendorfは21歳であった。彼はSophia Von Andechs Of Bavariaとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1190年9月14日にシリアアル hアサカマーカブで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII(이)가 1140년 독일 베이른 wu르즈버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertha Von Putelendorf(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1190년 9월 14일 시리아 앨 h아사카 마카브에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII nasceu em 1140, em Würzburg, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Bertha Von Putelendorf, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas com Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1190, em Markab, Al Ḩasakah, Síria, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII родился в 1140 г. в местности вuрзбург, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Bertha Von Putelendorf, 21. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери от Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria. Он умер 14 сентября 1190 г. в местности маркаб, аль hасаках, Сирия в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII nació en 1140, en Würzburg, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Bertha Von Putelendorf, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas con Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1190, en Markab, Al Ḩasakah, Siria, a la edad de 50 años.
